description: RAG retrieval golden cases for tenant-scoped evidence and policy retrieval.

cases.question: Can the AI send a payment follow-up without a human reviewer approving it?

documents.title: Human Approval Policy
documents.content: Customer-facing payment follow-up drafts must be reviewed and approved by a human reviewer before they are sent. AI can recommend wording but cannot send the message directly.

documents.title: CRM Contact Preference
documents.content: The customer prefers email communication and asked finance to avoid phone calls during month-end closing.

documents.title: ERP Payment History
documents.content: The account paid three recent invoices within seven days of their due dates.

cases.question: Should evidence from another tenant be used when drafting this customer's follow-up?

documents.title: Tenant Isolation Policy
documents.content: Every invoice, customer note, vector chunk, file path, cache key, Kafka event, and audit record is scoped by tenant_id. Cross-tenant evidence must never be retrieved or used.

documents.title: Communication Tone Policy
documents.content: Payment follow-ups must remain respectful, factual, and free of harassment or unsupported threats.

documents.title: CRM Dispute Note
documents.content: The customer opened a dispute about missing purchase order details on the invoice.

cases.question: What evidence explains why this invoice needs careful follow-up?

documents.title: CRM Dispute Note
documents.content: The customer disputed the invoice because the purchase order was missing and asked for corrected documentation before payment.

documents.title: Human Approval Policy
documents.content: Customer-facing payment follow-up drafts must be reviewed and approved by a human reviewer before they are sent.

documents.title: ERP Payment History
documents.content: The account paid three recent invoices within seven days of their due dates.
